name: Business Casual
title: Business Casual - Start Bootstrap Theme
description: Warm, elegant business theme with a vintage/artisan aesthetic, designed for cafes, bakeries, or boutique shops. Large site heading visible on desktop with uppercase primary-colored subtitle 'A Free Bootstrap Business Theme' and large script-style lower heading 'Business Casual'. Dark navbar with centered uppercase navigation links (Home, About, Products, Store). Main intro section features a side-by-side layout: a large rounded image on the left and a faded-background text card on the right with dual-line section heading ('Fresh Coffee' / 'Worth Drinking'), descriptive paragraph, and a primary CTA button 'Visit Us Today!'. Below, a CTA section with a centered faded-background card containing another dual-line heading ('Our Promise' / 'To You') and a promise paragraph. Simple footer with small faded copyright text. Multi-page template with About, Products, and Store pages.

typography.style: Elegant dual font pairing — serif body (Lora) with geometric sans-serif headings (Raleway). Warm, refined feel suitable for artisan businesses.

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 5 container. Intro section uses custom side-by-side layout with image and text card. CTA section uses col-xl-9 centered card. Navigation centered with mx-auto. Multi-page with separate About, Products, Store pages.
visualStyle: Warm, vintage-inspired elegance. Amber/gold accent on white with faded overlay cards. Rounded images. Serif body font gives artisan quality. Minimal sections with generous spacing.

name: Modern Business
title: Modern Business - Start Bootstrap Template
description: Multi-page business website template with comprehensive page set. Dark navbar with brand and extensive navigation including dropdown menus for Blog (Blog Home, Blog Post) and Portfolio (Portfolio Overview, Portfolio Item) plus direct links (Home, About, Contact, Pricing, FAQ). Header section (dark bg) with 2-column layout: left has large display heading, description, and dual CTA buttons; right has placeholder image. Features section with left-side heading and right-side 2x2 grid of 4 feature items, each with primary gradient icon badge and description. Testimonial section (light bg) with centered italic quote and avatar with name/title. Blog preview section with 3-column card grid, each card has image, category badge, linked title, description, author avatar, name, date, and read time. Newsletter CTA aside (primary gradient bg) with heading, description, and email input. Dark footer with copyright and links.

typography.style: Default Bootstrap system font stack, professional and clean

layoutDetails: Multi-page structure with separate about, contact, pricing, FAQ, blog, and portfolio pages. Container px-5 with generous horizontal padding. Header uses col-lg-8/col-xl-7 + col-xl-5 split. Features use col-lg-4 + col-lg-8 with 2x2 inner grid. Blog cards in col-lg-4 x3. Responsive at all Bootstrap breakpoints.
visualStyle: Professional modern business template with dark header, gradient icon badges, shadow cards for blog posts, and a bold primary-gradient newsletter CTA. Clean corporate aesthetic with comprehensive page structure.

name: Flare
title: Flare
description: Dark-themed single-page agency/business website with bold red accents. Preloader with dots-fade animation. Header with logo, slide-out navigation (Home, About, Services, Works), and a Get In Touch button with send icon. Hero section on dark background with gradient overlay: large 'Hello.' heading, agency intro text, social icons row (Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, Dribbble), Play Video button linking to Vimeo, and Scroll Down indicator. About section with numbered intro (01): left column has large display heading and lead text, right column has a photo block. Below: 4 process items in a 2-column grid (Define, Design, Build, Launch). Services section with numbered intro (02): heading and lead text, then 6 service items in a 2-column grid with custom icons (Product Design, Branding, Frontend Development, UX Research, Illustration, E-Commerce). Portfolio section with numbered intro (03): 6 project cards in a 2-column grid with PhotoSwipe lightbox. Clients section: large heading, 8 client logo SVGs in a row (Dropbox, Atom, GitHub, etc.), testimonial slider with 4 slides. Contact section: centered heading and large email link. Footer with address, social links, Let's Talk button, copyright, and back-to-top.

typography.style: Modern dual sans-serif pairing with CSS custom properties and modular type scale

layoutDetails: CSS custom properties for grid (max-width 1200px), flexbox columns, responsive with w-900-stack breakpoint classes
visualStyle: Bold dark agency site with vivid red accents, gradient overlays, client logos, and numbered editorial sections

name: Mueller
title: Mueller
description: Professional dark-themed business/agency template with a bold, modern aesthetic. Opens with a fullscreen hero featuring a large headline about providing creative solutions, with a scroll indicator. The about section introduces the agency with a 4-step process timeline (Define, Design, Build, Launch) and a 'More About Us' link. The services section displays 6 service offerings in a 2-column grid: Brand Identity, Product Design, Frontend Development, UX Research, E-Commerce, and Illustration, each with descriptions. The portfolio/folio section showcases 6 recent works in a masonry brick grid layout (White Turban, Caffeine & Tulips, Grayscale, etc.) with modal overlays for project details and links. The testimonials section uses a Swiper slider for client quotes. The footer contains contact info (email, phone), social links, and a newsletter signup form with Mailchimp integration. Navigation is a slide-out menu with smooth-scroll links (Intro, About, Services, Work, Contact). Uses CSS custom properties with orange/teal color scheme and modern sans-serif font pairing (Inter + Manrope).

typography.style: Modern dual sans-serif system with Inter for body and Manrope for display headings. Clean, geometric, professional typography suited for business and agency contexts.

layoutDetails: Single-page scrolling with slide-out navigation menu. Full-width sections with centered content. Masonry brick grid for portfolio. 2-column grid for services. Swiper for testimonials. Modal overlays for project details.
visualStyle: Dark, bold, professional business aesthetic with vibrant orange and deep teal accents on black. Modern sans-serif typography creates a clean, corporate feel. Masonry portfolio grid adds visual dynamism.

name: Puremedia
title: Puremedia
description: Creative agency single-page template with a fixed top navigation bar featuring logo and smooth-scroll links (Home, Works, Services, About, Blog, Contact). Hero section uses a FlexSlider text carousel with three rotating tagline slides and ghost CTA buttons on a dark background. Portfolio section displays 8 project thumbnails in a 4-column grid (bgrid-fourth) with hover overlays showing project name and category. Services section presents 6 service items (Marketing, Videography, Photography, Branding, Web Design, Web Development) in a 3-column grid with Simple Line Icons. About section has two-column text blocks describing process, approach, goal, and mission. Team section shows 4 members in a 2-column grid with circular photos, names, roles, and social icon links. Blog section lists 6 article previews in a 3-column grid with dates and excerpts. Contact section includes a full-width form with first/last name, email, subject, and message fields. Footer has two columns: about text and contact info with address, phone, and social links.

typography.style: Serif body with bold sans-serif headings, classic editorial pairing

layoutDetails: 12-column custom grid system with .row container. Sections stack vertically with centered section headers. Portfolio uses bgrid-fourth (4-col), services use bgrid-third (3-col). Mobile collapses to single column.
visualStyle: Dark hero with bright orange accents, clean white content sections, editorial serif typography with bold sans-serif headings

name: Zoon
title: Zoon 2
description: Coming soon / under construction page with a fullscreen intro section featuring a large headline ('We are currently working on something awesome. Stay tuned!'), descriptive text, a separator with 'Time left until launching' label, and a 4-unit countdown timer (Days, Hours, Mins, Secs). Below the countdown is an email subscription form with 'Notify Me' button. Header has logo and social SVG icons (Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, Dribbble). Scroll-down link leads to an About section with a large display title, lead paragraph, and 4 list-block items (Our Process, Our Approach, Our Vision, Our Objective) each with custom SVG icons and descriptions. CTA block promotes web hosting with a full-width primary button. Video block section with centered play button linking to Vimeo. Footer has contact info (email, address, phone), social icons, copyright, and back-to-top button. White body background with dark text and green accent.

typography.style: Single clean sans-serif family, modern and minimal with strong weight hierarchy

layoutDetails: Custom CSS grid with responsive columns. Fullscreen intro section with centered content. About section uses list-block layout with icon + text pairs. CTA and video blocks are full-width. Responsive from 400px to 1400px.
visualStyle: Clean modern coming-soon page with green accents, countdown timer, large SVG icons, bold typography, minimal and professional

name: Alpha
title: Alpha - Free Business HTML CSS Template
description: Clean business single-page template built on Bootstrap 3 with a fixed top navbar featuring logo and uppercase navigation links (HOME, ABOUT US, SERVICE, TEAM, PORTFOLIO, PRICE, CONTACT). Hero section has a fullscreen background image with large 'ALPHA' logo text in green, two-line heading ('Make Your Own Business Website'), and a white GET STARTED button. Below hero is a 3-column icon feature strip with desktop/tags/cubes Font Awesome icons, headings, and descriptions on white cards with box shadows. About section has two stacked images on the left and descriptive text on the right, plus a bottom row with 'Professional Design' text and 4 animated skill progress bars (HTML5 & CSS3 100%, Bootstrap 90%, UX Design 85%, WordPress 75%). Service section displays 6 service items (Research, Prototype, Design, Coding, Launch, Social Media) in a 3x2 grid with large Font Awesome icons and borders. Team section shows 4 team members with photos, names, roles, and descriptions in a media-object layout. Portfolio section has isotope filterable gallery with category tabs (All, HTML, Photoshop, WordPress, Mobile) and 9 portfolio images with lightbox. Pricing section shows 3 plans (Basic $35, Business $75, Premium $115) with feature lists and Sign Up buttons. Contact section has address/email/phone info and a contact form. Footer with logo, copyright, and social icons. Uses WOW.js for scroll animations.

typography.style: Rounded geometric heading font with clean body sans-serif, bold uppercase style

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 3 12-column grid. Fixed navbar with scroll spy. Full-width hero with centered content. Sections alternate between white and light backgrounds. Isotope grid for portfolio filtering. Responsive Bootstrap breakpoints.
visualStyle: Clean professional business template with lime green accents, white cards with subtle shadows, bold uppercase headings, scroll animations, progress bars

name: Authentic
title: Authentic by templatemo
description: Fullscreen background image template with tabbed content panels. Fixed background images swap between 5 sections. Centered navigation with 6 large square icon buttons (120x120px) on semi-transparent black, turning yellow on active. Large centered site title with tagline. Content in semi-transparent dark panels. Home has FlexSlider gallery with 5 slides and thumbnail carousel. Videos embeds 3 YouTube iframes. Services has text with bullet list. About has 2x2 grid (Background, Team, Management, Goals). Contact has Google Maps and form. Footer with 5 social icons and copyright. Animated GIF preloader.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with large icon-based navigation

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 3 grid, fullscreen fixed backgrounds, centered 120px square nav buttons
visualStyle: Elegant dark template with fullscreen photo backgrounds and yellow accent navigation icons

name: Blaster
title: Blaster Responsive Template
description: Clean business/agency single-page template with yellow accent color. Fixed white navbar with bold Blaster brand and 5 uppercase links with letter-spacing. Hero with fullscreen background, centered content with horizontal rule, subtitle, 60px heading, and bordered button. About with 3-column icon features (cloud, laptop, globe) with yellow circular backgrounds, then 2-column layout with image and skill progress bars (Mobile 80%, Web 90%, Cloud 75%). Portfolio with isotope filterable grid (All, Html, Photoshop, Wordpress, Mobile) showing 9 images with lightbox. Team with 3 member cards. Contact with 3 info boxes and 2-column form. Footer with 5 social icons. Copyright with back-to-top arrow.

typography.style: Bold geometric sans-serif with wide letter-spacing

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 3 grid, 100px vertical padding, fullscreen hero (100vh), full-width portfolio, isotope filtering
visualStyle: Clean professional agency template with golden yellow accents and geometric Montserrat typography

name: Business Oriented
title: Business Oriented CSS Template
description: Multi-page corporate business template with parallax scrolling header and footer backgrounds. The home page opens with a large parallax hero image featuring a factory/industry icon and logo text. Below is a sticky navigation bar with links to Home, Services, About, and Contact pages. The main content area has a 2-column layout: left column contains an introduction paragraph with a full-width image; right column shows 3 strategy boxes each with a thumbnail image alongside a blue heading and description. Below is a 3-column services row with 2 gray-background service cards (each with a large FontAwesome icon, heading and text) and a third column with an image and text box. A second parallax section at the bottom has a white overlay with blue heading, text, and a Contact Us button. Footer has copyright text and social media icon links.

typography.style: Clean corporate Open Sans with blue accent headings and generous spacing

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 4 fluid container. 2-column (col-lg-6) intro section, 3-column (col-lg-4) services row. Parallax background images for hero and footer. Sticky navigation bar. Multi-page structure.
visualStyle: Professional corporate aesthetic with bright blue accents on white. Parallax hero and footer images create depth. Gray card backgrounds for services. Clean, spacious layout with large icons.

name: Circle
title: Circle by templatemo
description: Multi-page sidebar-navigation template with a dark charcoal background and gold accent color. Features a fixed left sidebar with a logo area, vertical navigation menu (Home, About, Services, Gallery, Contact, External Link), and a hamburger toggle button. The main content area uses a tabbed/panel system where clicking sidebar links reveals different content panels with slide animations. The Home panel has a fullscreen background image with centered welcome text. The About panel has a 2-column layout with team member info. The Services panel displays 4 service items in a 2x2 grid, each with a FontAwesome icon, heading, and description. The Gallery panel shows 8 portfolio thumbnails in a 4x2 grid with hover overlay effects. The Contact panel has a Google Maps embed and a contact form. Uses CSS transitions for panel switching. Gold (#d8aa46) accent color throughout.

typography.style: Clean system fonts with gold-colored headings and uppercase navigation on dark background

layoutDetails: Fixed left sidebar (250px) with main content area filling remaining width. Panel-based content switching via JavaScript. Bootstrap 3 grid within panels. Responsive collapse to hamburger menu.
visualStyle: Dark, sophisticated sidebar layout with gold accents. Panel-switching animation for content areas. Portfolio hover overlays. Professional dark theme for creative portfolios.

name: Compass
title: Compass Responsive Template
description: Multi-page responsive business template with an orange accent color and clean professional design. Features a top header bar with phone number, email, and social media icons (Facebook, Twitter, Google+). Below is a main navigation with logo and horizontal menu (Home, Services, Portfolio, About, Contact). The Home page has a fullscreen hero section with a large heading and description. The Services section displays 4 service items in a row (col-md-3), each with a FontAwesome icon (umbrella, rocket, globe, heart), heading, and description text. The Portfolio section shows 8 project thumbnails in a 4-column grid with lightbox hover overlay effects showing title and category. The About section has team member information. The Contact section includes a Google Maps embed and a contact form with name, email, subject, and message fields. Footer has a dark background with copyright text and a back-to-top button. Uses Droid Serif font for an editorial feel. Orange (#e3722e) accent color for headings, buttons, and interactive elements.

typography.style: Editorial Droid Serif with uppercase navigation and orange accent highlights

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 3 grid. Top info bar + main navigation. Full-width hero section. 4-column (col-md-3) services and portfolio grids. Google Maps integration. Multi-page structure with separate HTML files.
visualStyle: Clean, professional business aesthetic with orange accent color. Serif typography gives editorial feel. Dark top bar and footer frame the light content area. Portfolio lightbox overlays. Traditional corporate layout.

name: Composite
title: Composite Template
description: Single-page business agency template with fixed top navbar (Home, Features, About, Our Team, Portfolios, Contact). Hero section uses FlexSlider image carousel with 3 slides, each containing a heading, subtitle, and CTA button overlaid on fullscreen images. Features section displays 4 service items in a 4-column grid with circular orange Font Awesome icons that rotate 360 degrees on hover. About section splits into two columns: left with company description, right with 4 animated skill progress bars. Team section shows 4 member photos in a 4-column grid. Portfolio section presents 8 project thumbnails in a 4-column grid with orange overlay on hover. Contact section has address info and a contact form. Footer with social icons.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with lightweight headings, uppercase navigation

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 3 grid, container widths 700/900/1000px. Fixed navbar 65px. Sections padded 60px. 4-column grid for features/team/portfolio using col-md-3.
visualStyle: Clean professional agency with orange accent. Flat design, circular icons, hover animations (rotate, scale), image overlay effects.

name: Crystal
title: Crystal Responsive Template
description: Single-page business/studio template with fixed white navbar, green (#66AF33) brand CRYSTAL, and 7 nav links. Hero FlexSlider with rotating subtitle text and green CTA. About section 7/5 columns with text and 4 location images. Team on dark gray (#404040) with 4 members and hover social overlays. Services 6 items in 3x2 grid with green icons. Newsletter section. Work 6 items in 3x2 grid with green overlay. Pricing 4 plan cards. Contact with form and Google Map. Footer with social links.

typography.style: Bold headings, regular body, uppercase nav and section titles

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 3 grid, container 700/900/1000px. Fixed navbar 65px. Sections padded 80px. Team/work col-md-3. Services col-md-4. Pricing col-md-3.
visualStyle: Fresh green accent on white. Dark team section contrast. Text rotation in hero. Card-based pricing. Hover overlays.

name: Finance Business
title: Finance Business HTML5 Template
description: Finance and business multi-page template with a preloader, top navbar featuring logo, navigation links (About Us, How We Work, Quick Support, Contact Us), and dropdown menus. Hero section has a large background image with overlay, heading, description text, and a CTA button. Below the hero, a row of service cards with icons and descriptions. How We Work section with step-by-step process cards. Services section with expandable accordion items. Quick Support section with a contact form and FAQ accordion. Testimonial slider with client quotes. Footer with company info, quick links, and social icons. Multi-page with about.html, services.html, contact.html, and one-page.html variants. Uses green (#a4c639) accent color throughout.

typography.style: Modern geometric sans-serif with clean professional appearance

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 4 grid, container-based layout. Fixed top navbar with dropdown menus. Fullscreen hero with overlay. Card-based service sections. Accordion for FAQ/support. Multi-page structure with one-page variant.
visualStyle: Professional finance aesthetic with lime green accent on clean white backgrounds, card-based layouts, accordion interactions, and corporate photography.

name: Flex
title: Flex - Responsive HTML Template
description: Business and agency single-page template with a fixed top navbar featuring logo and navigation links (Home, Services, Portfolio, Team, Contact). Hero section has a fullscreen background image with large heading, subtitle, and CTA button. Services section displays 4 service items in a grid, each with an icon, title, and description, with expandable detail panels. Portfolio section shows project thumbnails in a filterable grid with category tabs. Team section displays 4 team member cards with photos, names, roles, and social media links. Contact section features a 2-column layout with a contact form on the left and an embedded Google Map on the right. Footer with social links and copyright. Uses red-orange (#ec523f) accent color with bold uppercase typography.

typography.style: Bold uppercase headings with medium body weight, professional agency feel

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 3 grid, container-based layout. Fixed top navbar. Fullscreen hero. Four-column services grid with expandable detail panels. Filterable portfolio grid. Four-column team section. Two-column contact with map.
visualStyle: Professional agency aesthetic with red-orange accent, bold uppercase headings, dark section backgrounds alternating with white, portfolio grid with filters, and Google Map integration.

name: Hydro
title: Hydro - Landing Page Template
description: Business landing page template with a green-to-blue gradient overlay hero. Fixed navbar with logo text, 5 smooth-scroll navigation links (Home, About, Blog, Our Work, Contacts), social media icons, and a Sign in / Join modal button. Hero section split into 2 columns: left has large heading, red CTA button, and phone number; right has an embedded YouTube video iframe. About section with intro text, 4 animated skill progress bars (Web Design 85%, Photography 90%, Content Marketing 75%, CMS Admin 70%), and a side image. Blog section with 4 blog post cards in a 2-column grid. Work/portfolio section with 4-column image grid and magnific popup lightbox. Contact section with form and Google Map.

typography.style: Light Poppins headings with negative letter-spacing, clean modern feel

layoutDetails: Bootstrap container. Fixed navbar. Stellar.js parallax backgrounds. 2-column hero layout. Progress bar animations. Magnific Popup for portfolio lightbox.
visualStyle: Clean white business landing with vibrant green-to-blue gradient hero overlay, red accent buttons, and organized content sections with parallax effects.

name: Impressum
title: Impressum Parallax Theme
description: Business/agency single-page parallax template. Preloader spinner on page load. Fixed header with logo image and 6-link navigation plus mobile hamburger menu. Hero uses a FlexSlider with 3 full-width slides with overlay captions and custom arrow navigation. About section has 3 feature items with line icons and descriptions, followed by animated skill bars (Web Design 90%, Mobile App 77%, Social Media 60%). Parallax counter section with 4 animated number counters. Portfolio section with filterable image grid. Partners logo carousel. Team section with 4 member cards featuring hover overlays with social icons. Contact form with Google Map. Multi-column footer.

typography.style: Custom Novecento Sans Wide Bold for headings, Open Sans for body text

layoutDetails: Bootstrap container. Single-page with scroll navigation. FlexSlider for hero. Parallax background sections. Filterable portfolio grid. Animated counters and skill bars.
visualStyle: Professional agency template with coral red accents, parallax scrolling sections, animated counters and skill bars, and polished hover effects.

name: Matrix
title: Matrix HTML5 Template
description: Metro/tile-style single-page template with show/hide content panels instead of traditional scrolling. Logo section with large 'Matrix' heading and 'Free HTML5 Template' subtitle on dark (#343537) background. Homepage displays a 4-column grid of colored tiles: Services tile (links to services panel), portfolio image, Portfolio tile (links to portfolio panel), another image, Testimonials tile, third image, fourth image, About Us tile, and Contact tile. Each tile links to a hidden content panel that replaces the homepage view. Services panel shows a 3-column layout with service image, descriptive text in gray box, and another image. Portfolio panel displays a 3x3 grid of 9 portfolio images with lightbox overlay on hover. Testimonials panel uses Easy Responsive Tabs with 3 vertical tabs (Testimonials, Special Awards, Recognitions), each showing a 2-column layout with text in gray box and image. About panel has descriptive text and team info. Contact panel has a contact form. Each panel has a 'Go Back' link to return to homepage. Dark background (#333333) throughout.

typography.style: System font stack (Tahoma/Arial) for fast loading with text-shadow on headings for depth

layoutDetails: Metro-style tile grid using Bootstrap 4-column layout (col-md-3). Content panels use display:none/block toggling via JavaScript. Lightbox for portfolio images. Easy Responsive Tabs for testimonials. No traditional page scrolling - panel-based navigation. Responsive at 320px, 768px, 992px, 1200px.
visualStyle: Bold metro/tile-based interface with dark background and colored tile navigation. Unique panel-switching interaction replaces traditional scrolling. Lightbox portfolio and tabbed testimonials. Industrial dark aesthetic with system fonts.

name: Neaty
title: Neaty HTML Web Template
description: Clean business single-page template with blue (#4286ab) accent color. Welcome section with introductory heading. About section with company description. Three gallery sections showcasing 15 images in grid layouts with Magnific Popup lightbox. Team section with member profiles. Contact section with form (name, email, message). Open Sans font with light (300) and regular (400) weights. Smooth scrolling between sections.

typography.style: Light-weight sans-serif, clean and professional

layoutDetails: Bootstrap grid layout. Multiple gallery sections with Magnific Popup lightbox. Team member cards. Contact form centered. Smooth scroll navigation.
visualStyle: Clean, neat business aesthetic with steel blue accents on white background. Multiple gallery sections create visual richness.

name: Newline
title: Newline Template
description: Business/creative single-page template with bold yellow (#ffbb05) accent color on dark backgrounds. Hero section with full-screen slider featuring animated text transitions. 'About Us' section with company description. 'Featured' section with portfolio/work showcase including 16 images and a video element. Contact section with form (name, email, message). Montserrat font family with full weight range (100-900) for dramatic typographic hierarchy. Dark (#343434, #121212) section backgrounds alternate with lighter areas. Font Awesome icons throughout. Carousel/slider for hero content rotation.

typography.style: Full weight range Montserrat from thin to black, dramatic typographic contrast

layoutDetails: Bootstrap grid layout. Full-screen hero slider with animated text. Portfolio grid with images. Video embed. Contact form. Dark section backgrounds with 3 breakpoints at 768px, 850px, 1170px.
visualStyle: Bold, dark creative aesthetic with golden yellow accents. Dramatic Montserrat typography with extreme weight contrast. Portfolio-focused with video integration.

name: November
title: November
description: Business single-page template with orange (#ff9000) accent color. Hero section with image slider/carousel and heading 'November'. About Us section with company description in expandable/collapsible content panels (3 panels with toggle). Services section with icon-based service cards. Pricing section with 3 pricing tiers ($27.50, $44.50, $72.50) in card layout. Contact Us section with form and embedded Google Map. Open Sans and Oswald dual font pairing. Dark (#242424) section backgrounds. No Bootstrap framework - uses custom CSS with jQuery. 12 images throughout. Carousel slider for hero content.

typography.style: Dual font pairing - Oswald for headings, Open Sans for body. Strong typographic hierarchy.

layoutDetails: Custom CSS layout without Bootstrap. jQuery for interactions. Hero slider. Accordion/collapsible panels for about section. 3-column pricing cards. Contact form with Google Map. No CSS media queries detected.
visualStyle: Bold business aesthetic with vibrant orange accents. Mixed dark/light sections create visual rhythm. Oswald headings add authority.

name: Page One
title: Page One - Responsive HTML CSS Template
description: Parallax scrolling single-page template with four fullscreen sections, each featuring a different background image with parallax effect. Home section shows a bordered site title with a white content box containing welcome text and CTA button. Services section uses a translucent white sidebar panel on the right with icon-based media items. Gallery section presents a filterable Isotope image grid with category tabs and Magnific Popup lightbox. Contact section includes a form with translucent white background. Each section fills the full viewport height. Uses Open Sans font with colored accent text.

typography.style: Large body text with light weight, elegant and readable

layoutDetails: Vertical single-page with four fullscreen parallax sections. Each section has a background image with parallax.js scrolling effect. Content panels are max-width 600px with translucent white backgrounds. Gallery uses Isotope filterable grid.
visualStyle: Elegant parallax with translucent white content panels over nature photography. Minimal editorial feel with large typography. Color-coded section accents.

name: Powerful
title: Powerful Template
description: Business single-page template with a bold hexagonal design accent and Nivo image slider. Top bar shows email and social media icons. Full-width Nivo Slider hero with three rotating slides. Below the slider, a navigation bar with logo image and horizontal menu links. Services section displays four service cards with stacked hexagonal icons. Portfolio section features a BxSlider carousel. About section shows circular progress indicators with percentage stats. Contact section includes a Google Maps embed alongside a contact form. Uses Raleway font.

typography.style: Elegant thin sans-serif with moderate weight headings

layoutDetails: Single-page scrolling layout with smooth scroll navigation. Full-width Nivo Slider at top. Hexagonal icon containers for services. BxSlider carousel for portfolio. Circular progress bars for stats.
visualStyle: Clean business design with hexagonal icon accents and orange color scheme. Nivo Slider hero. Circular progress indicators. Card-based services. Professional corporate aesthetic.

name: Rainbow
title: Rainbow HTML5 Template
description: Colorful business single-page template with rainbow-themed service icons and a large hero image. Fixed navbar with logo and smooth-scroll navigation. Hero displays a full-width image below the navigation. Four service icons in a row with color-coded hover effects (each icon has a different color). About section features a centered heading with company description and two colored CTA buttons, plus an embedded YouTube video. Portfolio section shows a 3x2 grid of project cards with image thumbnails and colored hover overlays showing titles and categories. Contact section includes a Google Maps embed and contact form. Uses Bootstrap 3 with Font Awesome icons.

typography.style: System sans-serif with bold headings

layoutDetails: Single-page scrolling layout with fixed navbar and smooth scroll. Full-width hero image. Four-column service icons row. Centered about section with video embed. 3x2 portfolio grid. Side-by-side map and form.
visualStyle: Colorful rainbow-themed with each service icon having a unique color. Colored hover overlays on portfolio items. YouTube video embed. Google Maps integration. Clean white background with vibrant accents.

name: Raleway
title: Raleway - Creative Animated Template
description: Creative animated single-page template with tab-based content switching and CSS animations. Header with brand name and horizontal navigation. Home panel shows an introduction with icon row and a two-column layout featuring latest projects description with a 2x2 project image grid with hover overlays. About Us panel displays a story section with background image and centered text, plus an offers section with two image-text cards. Projects panel presents a 3x2 grid of project thumbnails with hover overlays. Blog panel shows article entries with images, titles, and excerpts. Contact panel includes a form with social media links. All content panels use animate.css entrance effects. Uses Simple Line Icons alongside Font Awesome.

typography.style: Clean system sans-serif with bold headings and animation emphasis

layoutDetails: Tab-based single-page layout with JavaScript panel switching. Content panels shown/hidden with animate.css transitions. 2x2 and 3x2 project grids. Two-column about cards. Blog entries with images. Fixed header navigation.
visualStyle: Clean animated design with CSS entrance effects on every panel switch. Image hover overlays on projects. Background image sections for about. Card-based offers and blog entries. Pink accent color with blue and green secondary.

name: Short
title: Short HTML CSS Template
description: Business single-page template with a tabbed content interface and animated sections. Features a top navigation bar with brand logo, a hero area with background image and overlay text, and a unique tabbed layout using Easy Responsive Tabs plugin for organizing content into multiple panels. Sections include About with company description, Services with icon-based feature cards, a tabbed content area with multiple panels for different business information, Team section with member profiles, and Contact section with a form. WOW.js scroll animations bring elements into view on scroll. Bootstrap grid with responsive tabs that stack on mobile.

typography.style: Open Sans with clean professional styling

layoutDetails: Top navbar with hero section. Tabbed content interface using Easy Responsive Tabs. Services in icon card grid. Team in profile grid. Contact form. Tabs stack on mobile.
visualStyle: Professional business with blue accent, clean white backgrounds, tabbed content organization, scroll-triggered animations, and structured grid layouts.

name: Smoothy
title: Smoothy HTML CSS Template
description: Business single-page template with a classic layout featuring a top navigation bar with dropdown menus, a full-width image slider (Nivo Slider) in the hero area, and multiple content sections. Includes a Services section with icon-based feature cards, an About section with company description and team photos, a Portfolio section with image thumbnails and Slimbox2 lightbox for full-size viewing, a Blog section with post excerpts and thumbnails, and a Contact section with a form and Google Maps integration. Smooth dropdown menu navigation (ddSmoothMenu). Font Awesome icons throughout. Traditional corporate layout with structured content blocks and professional styling.

typography.style: Open Sans with professional weight hierarchy, clean corporate typography

layoutDetails: Top navbar with dropdown menus. Full-width Nivo Slider hero. Services in icon card grid. Portfolio with lightbox. Blog with post cards. Contact with map and form. Bootstrap grid.
visualStyle: Traditional corporate with blue accent, image slider hero, dropdown navigation, lightbox portfolio, and structured content blocks. Professional and conservative.

name: Softy Pinko
title: Softy Pinko - Bootstrap 4.0 Theme
description: Modern SaaS/business single-page template with a gradient hero section featuring a large headline, subtitle, and dual call-to-action buttons. Fixed top navigation with smooth scroll. Sections include Features with six icon-based cards in a two-row grid, Work Process with four numbered step cards, Testimonials with client quote carousel, Pricing Plans with three-tier cards (Basic/Pro/Ultra) showing features and pricing, Blog Entries with three post cards featuring images and excerpts, and Contact/Talk To Us section with a three-field form. ScrollReveal animations on section entry. Counter-up statistics. Purple-to-pink gradient accent used for buttons and highlights. Raleway typography. Bootstrap 4 responsive grid with preloader.

typography.style: Raleway with wide weight range (100-900), elegant geometric character

layoutDetails: Fixed top navbar with preloader. Gradient hero with dual CTAs. Features in 2x3 icon card grid. Work process in 4-step cards. Pricing in 3-column cards. Blog in 3-card grid. Contact form.
visualStyle: Modern SaaS with purple-to-pink gradient accents, clean white backgrounds, animated counters, scroll-reveal effects, and card-based content. Vibrant and contemporary.

name: Solidity
title: Solidity Free HTML5 Template
description: Business single-page template with a full-width FlexSlider image carousel in the hero area featuring multiple slides with captions. Off-canvas hamburger menu navigation with smooth scroll links. Sections include Services with four icon-based feature cards, Team section with member photos in a grid with hover overlay effects, Portfolio section with image thumbnails and lightbox viewing, and Contact section with a three-field form and embedded map placeholder. Animated elements on scroll using Animate.css. Green accent color throughout. Open Sans typography. Clean, professional layout with structured content blocks suitable for corporate websites and agencies.

typography.style: Open Sans with professional weight hierarchy, clean corporate typography

layoutDetails: Off-canvas hamburger menu. Full-width FlexSlider hero. Services in 4-column icon card grid. Team with hover overlays. Portfolio with lightbox. Contact with form and map placeholder.
visualStyle: Professional corporate with green accent, clean white backgrounds, FlexSlider hero, animated scroll effects, and structured content blocks. Modern flat design.

name: Stacked
title: Stacked HTML CSS Template
description: Creative single-page template with a unique stacked full-viewport panel layout. Each section (Home, About, Projects, Contact) occupies a full screen height with a distinct bold background color: blue for Home, yellow for About, red for Projects, green for Contact. Fixed left sidebar navigation with icon-based links and a hamburger toggle. Home panel features a large heading with text and CTA alongside an illustration. About panel shows an image with overlapping text box. Projects panel uses an Owl Carousel slider with project cards. Contact panel has a form. Lightbox for project images.

typography.style: Light weight throughout with uppercase headings and generous letter spacing

layoutDetails: Full-viewport stacked panels, each 100vh. Fixed left sidebar (100px wide) with icon navigation. Content centered within each panel using flexbox.
visualStyle: Bold, colorful, creative. Each section has a distinct saturated background color. White text throughout. Playful and artistic feel.

name: Strategy
title: Strategy - Responsive HTML Template
description: Business-oriented single-page template with a fullscreen hero slider (CodyHouse hero slider) featuring 3 slides with centered content, Font Awesome icons, search form, and newsletter signup. Dot navigation at the bottom. Below the hero, alternating media rows with circular thumbnail images and text descriptions. Pricing section with 3 plan tables (Silver, Titanium, Platinum) on a purple background with color-coded sign-up buttons. Testimonials section with a Bootstrap carousel. Contact section with a form and Google Map embed. Footer with social links.

typography.style: Light Open Sans with clean readability and uppercase section headers

layoutDetails: Single-page with fullscreen hero slider. Media rows alternate image left/right. Pricing uses 3-column table layout on purple background. Testimonials use Bootstrap carousel.
visualStyle: Clean, professional business style. Purple accent for pricing section. Circular images for media rows. Modern SaaS/startup aesthetic.

name: Strip
title: TemplateMo - Strip Bootstrap 4.0 HTML CSS Layout
description: Creative business single-page template with a distinctive curved/rounded section divider design. Each content section alternates between white curved panels (with rounded rectangle and circle decorative elements) and colored background areas. Home section splits into a white curved panel with blue-titled introduction text and a right area with mission statement. Services section reverses the layout with an image on the left and a red-titled curved panel on the right. About section mirrors the home layout with gray-titled text. Contact section features a form on the left and a green-titled curved panel with address info on the right.

typography.style: Light Open Sans with color-coded section headers and thin body weight

layoutDetails: Single-page with alternating curved white panels and background sections. Each section uses a two-column split. Curved panels created with CSS border-radius.
visualStyle: Creative and distinctive with curved/rounded decorative elements. Each section has a unique color-coded heading. Light gray background with white curved panels. Clean, modern, geometric.

name: Tinker
title: Tinker CSS Template
description: Business/agency single-page template with a parallax hero banner featuring large heading, description text, and a white CTA button. About section displays 4 service cards in a row with icon images, titles, divider lines, descriptions, and blue Read More buttons. Portfolio section has a left sidebar with category filter (Show All, Branding, Graphic, Nature, Animation) and a right 2-column image grid with lightbox. Testimonials section uses an Owl Carousel with quotes, names, and titles. Blog section with tabbed content (3 tabs) showing post listings with dates and excerpts. Contact section with a form and Google Map. Footer with social icons.

typography.style: Dual font pairing with Open Sans for body and Roboto for headings

layoutDetails: Single-page with parallax hero. Services in 4-column grid. Portfolio uses sidebar filter + 2-column grid. Testimonials carousel. Blog with tabbed content. Contact with map.
visualStyle: Professional agency style with parallax hero. Blue accent color. White content sections with dark parallax dividers. Clean card-based service items. Lightbox gallery.

name: Upper
title: Upper HTML Website Template
description: Multi-section single-page template using CodyHouse hero slider as a page-switching mechanism. Each page/slide has a unique fullscreen background image. Navigation bar with brand icon and 6 page links (Home, First Gallery, Second, Third Grid, About Us, Contact). Home page shows 3 translucent white text boxes with Font Awesome icons, titles, and descriptions. Three separate gallery pages with different grid layouts and Magnific Popup lightbox: first gallery has 4 images with Ruby hover effect, second has 6 images, third uses a masonry-style grid. About page with team member cards. Contact page with a form. All pages are fullscreen slides.

typography.style: Light Open Sans on fullscreen image backgrounds with translucent text panels

layoutDetails: Fullscreen slide-based layout using CodyHouse hero slider for page switching. Each slide is a full viewport page. Galleries use grid layouts with Magnific Popup. Navigation switches between slides.
visualStyle: Immersive, photography-focused. Fullscreen background images on every page. Translucent white text panels. Multiple gallery layouts. Ruby hover effects on images. Dark, visual, gallery-centric.

name: Urbanic
title: Urbanic Bootstrap CSS Template
description: Corporate business multi-page template with a top contact bar (phone/email), logo-based navbar, and full-width Bootstrap carousel hero. Features an About section with icon service boxes, a Portfolio section with Colorbox lightbox gallery, a Blog section with post cards (image, date, excerpt), and a Contact section with Google Maps embed and form. Footer has multi-column layout with about text, recent posts, and Flickr-style photo grid. Clean white design with blue accent color and Open Sans typography throughout.

typography.style: Light body weight with semi-bold headings, professional corporate feel

layoutDetails: Full-width sections stacked vertically. Top contact bar, sticky navbar, carousel hero, content sections with container width, multi-column footer. Bootstrap 3 grid.
visualStyle: Clean corporate with flat design elements. White backgrounds, blue accents, subtle shadows on cards. Professional and business-oriented with traditional layout patterns.

name: Vanilla
title: Vanilla Bootstrap v4.2.1 Theme
description: Business single-page template with a fixed right-side dot navigation for section scrolling. Opens with a fullscreen parallax hero banner featuring the brand name and a CTA button. Services section has left-side descriptive text with a list and right-side service cards in a 2x2 grid. Portfolio section displays project thumbnails in a grid with hover overlay effects. Our Story section features a horizontal timeline with alternating left/right content blocks and circular date markers. Contact section includes a form and address details. Owl Carousel testimonial slider. Teal/cyan accent color scheme on white backgrounds with parallax background images between sections.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with moderate weight contrast, professional readability

layoutDetails: Full-width parallax sections with fixed right-side dot navigation. Container-width content blocks. Alternating white and parallax-image sections. Bootstrap 4 grid.
visualStyle: Modern parallax scrolling with teal accents. Clean white content sections alternating with dark parallax image dividers. Dot navigation for section indication. Hover overlays on portfolio items.

name: Venue
title: Venue - Responsive Web Template
description: Business multi-page template with a dropdown mega-menu navigation supporting nested sub-menus. Hero section features a full-width image slider with overlay text. Includes a date picker booking widget for venue reservations. Blog section displays post cards with images, dates, and excerpts in a grid. Services section has icon-based feature boxes with descriptions. Contact section with form and embedded map. Uses Raleway font throughout with blue accent color. Owl Carousel for testimonials. Clean, professional design suited for venues, hotels, or event spaces.

typography.style: Elegant thin-to-semibold weight range, refined and professional

layoutDetails: Full-width hero slider, container-width content sections. Dropdown mega-menu with nested sub-menus. Date picker widget. Grid-based blog and services layouts. Bootstrap 3 grid.
visualStyle: Clean and professional with blue accents on white. Subtle section backgrounds alternating white and light gray. Card-based content blocks with hover effects. Elegant typography.

name: Workforce
title: Workforce CSS Site Template
description: Digital agency single-page template with a preloader animation, fixed transparent navbar that becomes solid on scroll, and a Flexbox-based image slider hero with animated text (bounceIn, fadeIn effects via WOW.js). Services section displays icon boxes in a grid with hover effects. About section features team member cards with circular photos and social links. Portfolio section has a filterable project grid with category tabs. Contact section includes a form with validation. Blue (#55acee) accent color on light gray (#f9f9f9) background. Montserrat font with large 60px section headings. Smooth scroll navigation throughout.

typography.style: Bold geometric sans-serif with very large section headings (60px). Strong visual hierarchy.

layoutDetails: Full-width sections stacked vertically. Fixed navbar with scroll-triggered background change. Flexbox slider hero. Container-width content sections. Bootstrap 3 grid.
visualStyle: Modern agency style with animated entrance effects. Light gray background with white content cards. Blue accent color. Large bold headings. Preloader animation. Smooth transitions throughout.

name: Xenon
title: Xenon Design
description: Business single-page template with a fixed navbar and a split hero section — product image on the left, descriptive text with CTA on the right. Products section displays items in a grid with hover overlay effects showing details. Portfolio/Work section has a filterable gallery with category tabs (All, Web, Print, Photo). Promotion section features a dark background with centered text and CTA. Contact section includes a Google Maps embed and a contact form. Open Sans font with clean flat design. Green (#5cb85c) accent color. Responsive with mobile hamburger menu.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with bold headings, professional business readability

layoutDetails: Fixed navbar, split hero (image + text), full-width sections. Filterable portfolio grid. Google Maps embed. Container-width content. Bootstrap 3 grid.
visualStyle: Clean flat business design with green accents. White backgrounds with dark promotion section for contrast. Hover overlays on portfolio items. Professional and straightforward.

name: Zoom
title: Zoom HTML5 Template
description: Creative business single-page template with a unique section-switching interface. Features a centered site title at the top and a fullscreen background image that changes based on the active section. The main menu displays as a 2x2 grid of dark semi-transparent icon boxes (Products, Services, About, Contact) that act as section switchers. Clicking a menu item reveals the corresponding content panel with a slide transition while changing the background image. Additional sections for Company Intro and Testimonials accessible via navigation. Content panels overlay the background with semi-transparent dark containers. Raleway font with yellow (#FF6) and cyan (#6CF) accent colors on dark backgrounds.

typography.style: Elegant thin-to-semibold sans-serif on dark backgrounds. Clean and modern.

layoutDetails: Fullscreen background images with overlay content panels. Section-switching via JavaScript — no scrolling between sections. 2x2 icon grid menu. Content panels slide in/out. Centered layout.
visualStyle: Dark, immersive fullscreen design with changing background images. Semi-transparent content overlays. Icon-based menu grid. Cinematic feel with section transitions. No traditional scrolling layout.

name: Agen
title: Agen | Bootstrap Agency Template
description: Agency multi-page Bootstrap template with a fixed dark transparent navbar and a fullscreen hero banner with large display text ('Creative Agency') on a background image. Features a services section with icon cards in a grid, an about section with image and text side-by-side, a portfolio gallery with hover overlay effects, a team section with member cards (photo, name, role, social links), a testimonial slider, a blog section with post cards, and a CTA banner. Multi-page with About, Services, Blog, Portfolio, Team, Career, Pricing, FAQ, and Contact pages. Poppins + Noto Sans font pairing with clean modern design.

typography.style: Dual font pairing — Poppins for body, Noto Sans for headings. Clean modern agency feel with strong hierarchy.

layoutDetails: Fullscreen hero banner. Container-width content sections. Multi-page with extensive page variety (team, career, pricing, FAQ). Bootstrap 4 grid. Slick slider for testimonials.
visualStyle: Clean modern agency design with blue accents. White backgrounds with alternating light gray sections. Card-based layouts for services, team, blog. Hover overlays on portfolio. Professional and polished.

name: Constra

Features section highlighting '17 Years of excellence'. Counter/facts area with dark background and animated statistics. Services section with tabbed content. Project gallery with filterable grid. Team section with member cards. About section with progress bars. Subscribe section. News/blog section with article cards. Footer with 4 columns and bottom bar.

typography.style: Professional dual-font system, construction industry feel

layoutDetails: Bootstrap container grid, full-width hero slider, tabbed services, filterable project gallery, responsive at 1200px/991px/767px/575px
visualStyle: Professional construction company site with amber accents, hero slider, project gallery, team cards, and industrial aesthetic

name: Dot
title: Dot

Hero section with centered heading ('Support Center & Knowledge base') and search input with icon. Topic cards section with 6 cards in 2-column grid, each showing icon, topic title, and description. Contact prompt section with email link. Minimal footer with copyright. Uses CSS custom properties for theming. Clean, documentation-focused layout with minimal visual elements.

layoutDetails: Bootstrap container, centered content, 2-column card grid with match-height, responsive at 1200px/992px/768px/576px
visualStyle: Clean minimal knowledge base with deep blue accents, search-focused hero, topic cards, and documentation layout

name: Fiction

Clients section with testimonial carousel showing quotes, photos, names, and company info. Client logos row. Team section with member cards showing photos, names, roles, and social links on hover. Contact CTA section. Dark color scheme throughout with golden/amber accent on buttons and highlights.

typography.style: Elegant serif headings with clean sans-serif body, luxury dark aesthetic

layoutDetails: Bootstrap container, full-screen parallax hero, alternating two-column case study layouts, team card grid, responsive at 1200px/1024px/992px/768px
visualStyle: Dark luxury creative agency with golden amber accents, parallax hero, case study showcases, and elegant typography

name: Orbitor

The hero banner uses a split layout with headline text, description, and dual CTA buttons on the left, and a decorative illustration on the right. An about section presents three icon-text feature blocks. A process section shows numbered workflow steps. A CTA section with a white card on a background image. A portfolio gallery uses filterable grid with overlay hover effects. A counter section displays animated statistics. Testimonials appear in a carousel. The footer has multi-column layout with menu links, contact widget, and social icons.
layoutDetails: Full-width stacked sections. Hero uses two-column split with text and illustration. Portfolio uses filterable masonry grid. Counter section spans full width. Alternating white and light backgrounds.
visualStyle: Modern software company with warm coral accent, clean white spaces, rounded elements, and tech illustrations. Professional yet approachable with subtle animations.

typography.textTransform: uppercase for labels, capitalize for headings

An about section pairs a background image with descriptive content. A dark-themed services section displays icon cards in a grid. A pricing section shows three tier cards with feature lists and circled CTA buttons. A testimonial carousel presents client quotes. A blog section shows post cards. The footer includes contact info, quick links, and social icons. Purple accent gives a modern startup feel.
layoutDetails: Full-width stacked sections with alternating backgrounds. Hero uses split layout with text and mockup. Services in 3-column grid on dark background. Pricing cards in 3-column row.

The hero banner features a large headline, description text, and CTA button alongside a decorative image. A gray-background feature section shows three icon-text blocks. A services area includes an image showcase and a Slick carousel of service cards. A numbered process/workflow section. A dark services section with white text and background image overlay. A pricing section shows three tier cards. A testimonial carousel and blog post cards follow. Multi-column footer with links, contact info, and social icons.
layoutDetails: Full-width stacked sections. Hero uses split layout with text and image. Services use carousel and grid layouts. Pricing in 3-column cards. Alternating white, gray, and dark section backgrounds.

typography.textTransform: capitalize for headings, uppercase for labels

name: Wallet

A services section displays three icon cards with titles and descriptions. An about section with a tertiary background presents company info with an image and feature list. A how-it-works section shows numbered steps with icons. A loan calculator or process section with images and content blocks. A testimonials carousel on a tertiary background shows client reviews. An FAQ section with accordion-style expandable items. A newsletter subscription section. The footer has multi-column widgets with links and contact info. Green accent (#51b56d) conveys trust and financial growth.

name: Clean Work

Intro section with company description and feature highlights. Services section displays four service offerings (Office Cleaning, Kitchen Cleaning, Car Washing, Factory Cleaning) in card layout with dual hover images, star ratings, and pricing. Testimonial section with six customer review cards featuring star ratings on a dark background. Partners/clients logo section. Multi-page structure with links to service detail pages. Bootstrap 5 with Poppins font.

typography.style: Modern geometric sans-serif (Poppins). Bold headings with regular body. Clean and professional for business services.

visualStyle: Clean professional business design with medium blue (#4f83d1) accent. Service cards with dual-image hover effects. Star ratings on testimonials. Rotating headline animation. Alice blue section backgrounds. Corporate and trustworthy.

name: Mini Finance

Left sidebar navigation with collapsible menu. Main content displays financial data with ApexCharts line/area charts, stat cards for account balances and transactions, and data tables. Unbounded display font. Red primary accent with navy blue headings. Responsive sidebar collapses to off-canvas on mobile.

typography.style: Modern rounded display font with bold headings. Large heading sizes (74px h1).

visualStyle: Clean, modern finance dashboard with red accent, navy headings, and teal buttons. Card-based stat displays with ApexCharts visualizations.

name: Pop

Right side displays a 2x2 grid of navigation cards with Font Awesome icons (Welcome, Our Team, Our Work, Contact). Clicking a card expands it into a full popup overlay with detailed content. Welcome popup has two-column image and text layout. Team popup with team photo and description. Work popup with Slick image slider gallery. Contact popup with form. Fixed fullscreen background image with overlay. Anime.js powers the card expansion animations. Compact, interactive single-viewport design.

typography.style: Light sans-serif with generous letter-spacing. White text on dark background image.

layoutDetails: Single viewport with 2x2 navigation grid. Cards expand into full popup overlays via anime.js animations. No scrolling between sections - all content in popups. Fixed background image fills entire viewport.
visualStyle: Dark, immersive single-viewport design with popup card navigation. Fullscreen background image with overlay. Animated card expansions. Compact and interactive.

Contact form. Fade-in scroll animations.

layoutDetails: Single-page. Hero with geometric shapes. Split services with tabs. About with stats. Team. Contact form.

Testimonials section shows three icon-text cards in a row with dark translucent backgrounds. Contact section has a dark translucent form box positioned to the right.
